roles.title: VLA Engineer (Full-time)
qualifications: MS/PhD or equivalent experience in robotics, computer science, or related fields.
Strong foundation in Python and deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch.
Hands-on experience building or fine-tuning vision-language-action models.
zhQualifications: 机器人、计算机或相关方向硕士/博士，或具备同等实践经验。
具备扎实的 Python 与深度学习框架（如 PyTorch）基础。
有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型搭建或微调的实操经验。
duties: Build and optimize end-to-end VLA training pipelines for manipulation and mobile manipulation tasks.
Collaborate with data and platform engineers to scale embodied datasets and evaluation benchmarks.
Deliver robust, production-oriented policies with measurable performance improvements.
zhDuties: 面向操作与移动操作任务，搭建并优化端到端 VLA 训练流水线。
与数据及平台工程团队协作，扩展具身数据集与评测基准。
交付稳健、可落地的策略模型，并实现可量化性能提升。

roles.title: SLAM Engineer (Full-time)
qualifications: Strong C++ engineering skills and practical ROS2 experience.
Experience with multi-sensor fusion for localization and mapping.
Ability to debug SLAM in real, noisy industrial environments.
zhQualifications: 具备扎实的 C++ 工程能力和实际 ROS2 开发经验。
有多传感器融合定位与建图经验。
能够在真实、噪声复杂的工业环境中调试 SLAM 系统。
duties: Develop robust localization and mapping modules for cluttered, dynamic indoor environments.
Improve sensor fusion quality across LiDAR, camera, and IMU in production robot systems.
Collaborate with autonomy and platform teams for deployment and validation.
zhDuties: 为复杂、动态的室内环境开发稳健的定位与建图模块。
提升量产机器人系统中 LiDAR、相机与 IMU 的融合质量。
与自主系统及平台团队协作完成部署与验证。

roles.title: Motion Planning Engineer (Full-time)
qualifications: Strong background in optimization, trajectory generation, and robotic control interfaces.
Hands-on experience with planning frameworks and kinematics libraries.
Ability to evaluate trade-offs among safety, smoothness, and runtime performance.
zhQualifications: 在优化、轨迹生成与机器人控制接口方面具备扎实基础。
有规划框架与运动学库的实战经验。
能够在安全性、平滑性与实时性能之间做工程权衡。
duties: Design global and local planners for mobile manipulation with safety and efficiency constraints.
Integrate planning with learned policies and runtime fail-safe behaviors.
Build tooling for planning evaluation, regression testing, and field diagnostics.
zhDuties: 面向移动操作任务设计全局与局部规划器，满足安全与效率约束。
将规划模块与学习策略、运行时故障保护机制进行集成。
构建规划评估、回归测试与现场诊断工具链。

roles.title: VLA Algorithm Researcher (Intern)
qualifications: Current MSc/PhD student in robotics, AI, machine learning, or a related discipline.
Solid coding ability and familiarity with modern ML tooling.
Strong interest in embodied intelligence and experimental research.
zhQualifications: 机器人、人工智能、机器学习或相关方向在读硕士/博士。
具备扎实编码能力，并熟悉现代机器学习工具链。
对具身智能与实验研究有强烈兴趣。
duties: Research representation learning, policy distillation, and long-horizon planning for embodied agents.
Prototype and validate algorithmic ideas on internal robot stacks and simulation benchmarks.
Document findings and communicate results with the research team.
zhDuties: 研究具身智能体的表征学习、策略蒸馏与长时程规划方法。
在内部机器人系统与仿真基准上完成算法原型与验证。
整理研究结论并与团队进行技术沟通与分享。
